name: Clam Chowder 3
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam clams in 1 quart water in a large kettle. Reserve the liquid to use as clam stock.
2. Dice the clams.
3. Cook the potatoes separately in 2 cups of boiling water for 5-10 minutes. Drain.
4. In a large pot, sauté the onion, peppers, celery, and paprika in butter until the vegetables are tender, about 6 minutes.
5. Add flour and Accent, stirring well so that the mixture does not brown.
6. Add clam stock, clam base, potatoes, and clams. Allow to simmer for 15 minutes.
7. Add tomatoes and simmer for an additional 5-10 minutes, covered.
8. Serve. This recipe may be kept for up to a week. The clam base may be purchased at any fish market.
